title: Notebook Edge Swap
prompt:
Create a production-ready Notebook Edge Swap using TypeScript React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. This original embedded transition changes a compact note between Draft and Final states. The content panel crossfades while a thin lime notebook edge travels from the left to the right, making the change directional but calm. Each state needs a distinctly written title and support sentence, so the result does not rely only on movement or accent color. Use a light Bento composition with #F4F5F6 stage, white card, #ECECEE borders, 22px corners, soft neutral shadow, #111111 text, and #4A4A4F support copy. Lime is the only bright accent, and no card surface may use a gradient.

Use a labelled group of two native 44px buttons with aria-pressed and a polite live status. Click, Enter, and Space must select either state. Move the notebook edge and content with a spring using stiffness 295 and damping 27; fade copy over 160ms ease-out. Keep local deterministic state only: no timers, random values, storage, remote data, network calls, browser globals, fixed positioning, or layout measurement. Favor opacity and transforms.

At 320px, buttons should retain their labels and the panel should not clip; at a larger detail preview, allow a readable maximum width. Include visible 3px focus rings, logical keyboard order, AA contrast, and written state cues beyond lime. Respect prefers-reduced-motion by swapping instantly with a 120ms opacity fade. Return complete client code, runnable pure CSS approximation, and suggested HTML.

code.css:
/* HTML: <section class="notebook-swap" data-page="draft">...</section> */
.notebook-swap{position:relative;max-width:340px;padding:20px;border:1px solid #ececee;border-radius:22px;background:#f4f5f6}.notebook-swap::before{position:absolute;top:0;bottom:0;left:0;width:8px;background:#d8f34e;content:""}.notebook-swap[data-page=final]::before{right:0;left:auto}.notebook-swap button{min-height:44px;border:1px solid #ececee;border-radius:12px;background:#fff;font-weight:800}.notebook-swap button:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #111;outline-offset:3px}@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.notebook-swap *{transition:none}}
